new.detail: Suwon District Court rejected Donghaeng Labor Union's provisional disposition request to halt Samsung wage deal vote. The court ruled the vote could proceed as scheduled. This effectively removed the last legal barrier to ratification. >93% turnout with DS division overwhelming majority virtually guarantees passage. Donghaeng hearing still scheduled May 29 but no pause effect. Strike risk: from 'active' to 'residual legal only.'
